check_content_excerpt:
The policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Suggest similar pages when a webpage can't be found" must be set to "Disabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge

If the value for AlternateErrorPagesEnabled is not set to "REG_DWORD = 0", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Suggest similar pages when a webpage can't be found" to "Disabled".
title: Suggestions of similar web pages in the event of a navigation error must be disabled.
